para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 Nishant 19/12/20 Added support for vck190.Added ReadModifyWrite() for writing to vck190 register space.set_vphy() renamed to config_phy() and has two parameters for linerate and lanecount.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main entry point for the debug example using the XDpTxSs driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function will print values set during DisplayPort TX Subsystem set up to work in MST/SST based upon RX device capabilities.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if DisplayPort TX Subsystem prints debug information successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function initialize required platform-specifc peripherals.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if required peripherals are initialized and configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function setup stream source to input DisplayPort TX Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para:
specifies whether to split video frame vertically into two different vertical halves.
1 = Vertically split input frame
0 = No vertically split input frame.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if stream source is configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function prints EDID info of RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function decodes and prints EDID header and tag information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if EDID blocks parsed successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function prints RX device identification data.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

briefdescription.para: This function prints structure version and revision of RX EDID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

briefdescription.para: This function prints basic display information of RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

briefdescription.para: This function prints color characteristics of RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

briefdescription.para: This function prints supported timings by the RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

briefdescription.para: This function prints standard timings of RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

briefdescription.para: This function prints preferred timing values of RX device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the EDID checksum.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used to retrieve data.

briefdescription.para: This function prints 128 byte content from EDID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to u8 variable that will be used for parsing EDID blocks.

briefdescription.para: This is the main function for XDpTxSs SST/MST example.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the MST/SST example passed.
XST_FAILURE if the MST/SST example was unsuccessful.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example using the XDpTxSs driver in single stream (SST) transport or multi-stream transport (MST) mode and provides DisplayPort Subsystem debug information at runtime.

simplesect.para: For this example to display output, the user need to implement initialization of the system (DpTxSs_PlatformInit) and after DisplayPort TX subsystem start (XDpTxSs_Start) is complete, implement configuration of the video stream source in order to provide the DisplayPort TX Subsystem HIP input. The functions DpTxSs_PlatformInit and DpTxSs_StreamSrc are declared and are left up to the user implement.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 07/01/15 Initial release. 2.00 sha 09/28/15 Added HDCP debug info function call. 4.1 ms 01/23/17 Modified xil_printf statement in main function to ensure that "Successfully ran" and "Failed" strings are available in all examples. This is a fix for CR-965028.
